The Minotti-inspired kitchen is clad in complementing white oak with precise lines, sourced from Germany’s Black Forest. Pillow-top sunrise scenery serves as a circadian clock. Mitered edge stonework, architectural lighting, and shadow-bead moldings create focal points. Ventilation and sound speakers are invisibly integrated. Mahogany, Italian marble and gun metal accent an elevator that rests beside your private, heated, multi-vehicle garage. Ultimate comfort is abundant, even for the most discerning. Moisturized air. Softened water. Lutron and Alexa Smart. Face recognition security. Privacy.  12 Henley Place is the Crown Jewel of Henley On Hudson, a well-manicured community of luxury homes whose amenities include a concierge, 24-hour security, swimming pool, three fitness centers, saunas, children's playroom and cinema. Residents relish the direct access to the New York Waterway and unparalleled views of The Greatest City in the World.

Stunningly unique 2-story penthouse in the sky with breathtaking panoramic NYC & Hudson River views! Step off your private elevator to see gorgeous south NYC views and a custom glass staircase with built-in wine storage. Walk into the heart of the home and be surrounded by the entire NYC skyline: this 2-story great room has a bar, custom fireplace, and balcony, while allowing you to see all the way from the George Washington Bridge to the Verrazano Bridge. Turn around and you’re in your spacious chef’s kitchen with white cabinetry and countertops, custom sink with instant hot water, oversized island and LaCornue stove with 8 burners and a pot filler.   The dining area has incredible northern views and its own balcony. The living room has custom paneling and storage, a wet bar with a dishwasher and freezer, and an additional balcony with stunning views. The upstairs landing is a luxurious custom office space with built-in shelves and a mirrored wall (with a hidden TV) to reflect the incredible views.   The expansive primary suite has an attached glass loft over the great room, panoramic views, skylights, a fireplace, walk-in closet, and a enormous ensuite bathroom with its own views over dual sinks, an enormous soaking tub, and walk-in shower with four showerheads.  To round out this incredible home, it has 3 additional bedrooms, each huge, with NYC/river views, unique custom ensuite bathrooms, and walk-in closets. This home was completely redone with all new systems, radiant heat flooring, Sonos Bluetooth throughout, and hurricane impact windows. Included is the NEST thermostat, electronic sun window shades, private storage and 2 garage parking spaces.  The luxury community of Riva Pointe offers 24/7 concierge and security, an indoor pool, fitness center, sauna, sundecks, and landscaped terraces. Sitting just steps from the NYC Ferry terminal as well as buses, light rail, the Lincoln Tunnel, and Whole Foods, this is one of the finest locations on the entire Gold Coast waterfront.
